title: Nursery Rhyme. CLXV. Songs.
content:
How does my lady's garden grow?
        How does my lady's garden grow?
        With cockle shells, and silver bells,
        And pretty maids all of a row.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CLXV. Songs."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
